content.en:
Kurosaki was very calm, and he didn't show any flaws, but it was impossible to ignore those half-step domain ancestors.

After all, the other party's breath is locked on him, if he pretends not to know, then there must be a problem!

Swish!

Kurosaki shuttled to the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor and said, "I don't know what a few people are using their breath to lock on to me?"

Ye Tian was the first to speak: "Your Excellency is relatively unfamiliar, and you are a half-step domain ancestor, so we just want to get to know each other! Your Excellency shouldn't be a half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, right?"

"Of course I'm not a half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, I'm a loose cultivator!"

Kurosaki hurriedly said.

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian and Yan Crack Dao Ancestor and they did it together, and the five forbidden realms restrained Kurosaki layer by layer.

At the same time, they also used the Attack Forbidden Dao Technique to deal with Kurosaki.

In this battle, Ye Tian was only assisting, constantly influencing Kurosaki with shadow thorns, but in fact, he couldn't deal too much damage, after all, the opponent's strength was the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and it was not the kind that had just broken through, but he had entered the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm for a long time, and his strength was strong among the half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

"What do you mean by that?"

Kurosaki said angrily.

"It doesn't mean anything, it's just that your identity is the Devourer, why do you think we're dealing with you?"

Ye Tian said.

"How do you know?"

Kurosaki was shocked.

He thought that he was very well hidden, and it was almost impossible for anyone to find out, and he had not been in contact with Ye Tian and Yan Crack Dao Ancestor before, how could he recognize his identity at a glance?

Bang!!!

Dense black scales appeared on Kurosaki's body, constantly devouring the forbidden Dao energy of Ye Tian and the others, coupled with his powerful defensive ability, so it was only a minor injury.

But he undoubtedly exposed his identity in this way, and he was the Devouring Clan!

"Sure enough, it's the Devourer!"

Flame Crack Dao Ancestor, their eyes were extremely cold.

When encountering the Devouring Clan, there is no doubt that it will be killed, this is an iron law.

After all, the growth of the Devouring Clan is tantamount to compressing their cultivation space, and once the Devouring Clan grows completely, then they will lose their cultivation environment, and it will be difficult for them to progress in the future.

Therefore, the Devouring Clan and the cultivators were mortal enemies, and there was no possibility of relief at all.

Escape!

Heisaki didn't want to fight with the Yan Split Dao Ancestor and them, because the number of Devouring Clans was too small now, and there were too many half-step domain ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there were even half-step domain ancestors in the Guiyi Realm, where would he dare to delay.

Otherwise, he will surely be defeated.

Only by escaping and hiding your whereabouts can you survive!

However, the five half-step domain ancestors besieged him, if Ye Tian could also be regarded as a Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor combat power, it would be the five Great Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors.

Heiqi didn't have the strength to compete with the five Great Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors alone, and the four Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain were not weak, among them, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor was even stronger than the Yan Crack Dao Ancestor, and he could be called the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

The Devourer is terrifying because they can easily devour the world, which no one else can do.

However, the Devourers are very poor in terms of cultivation, for example, it is too difficult for the Devourers to create a forbidden Dao technique.

If it weren't for the Devouring Clan's growth speed being fast enough, it wouldn't be difficult to become a domain ancestor, otherwise it wouldn't have been besieged by the cultivators.

Therefore, the combat effectiveness of the Devouring Clan at the same level is not good, for example, although Kurosaki is the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, he does not have the Tao of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, strictly speaking, the origin of the Ten Thousand Things Realm and the body of the Ten Thousand Things Realm create the Ten Thousand Things Realm, which is different from the cultivator system.

Strictly speaking, Kurosaki is already equivalent to the extreme half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm in terms of realm, but his combat power is only considered strong among the half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, but it is not the top.

This is also one of the flaws of the Devourer!

If there were no flaws, the Devourers would be unstoppable!

As the battle began, Kurosaki was in a state of being beaten, but the Devourer has the World Origin that can be consumed, and can quickly recover from injuries, as long as the World Origin is enough, it is difficult to be killed.

Of course, once the World Origin is seriously consumed, the cultivation of the Devouring Clan will even decrease, which is very strange in the eyes of cultivators, but the Devouring Clan is like this.

"Everyone, the Devouring Clan who has been devouring the universe and the Chaos Continent in large numbers recently is not me, and I don't know him! I have always practiced honestly and rarely devoured the world! Even if I devoured, it was only devouring the newly born world, but I didn't devour living beings on a large scale!"

Kurosaki explained.

"I don't need to explain, even if it's not you, but you're the Devourer, and we're mortal enemies. The reason why you don't dare to devour a large number of worlds is not because of your own weak strength. If there was no one in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm who was your opponent, you would have run out to devour the world a long time ago!"

Jin Chen Daozu sneered.

Kurosaki did not refute this.

In fact, it was also the case, because he was timid and cautious, he didn't devour the world in large quantities, but if everyone else was not his opponent, and he was invincible in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he would have devoured the world in large quantities long ago.

As time passed, Kurosaki Daozu couldn't bear it anymore, and his breath began to be unstable, because he consumed too much world origin, and the realm couldn't be maintained.

But if you don't use the world origin to recover from your injuries, you won't be able to bear it, and you will inevitably fall and die.

However, as he continued to repair his injuries, his defense began to decline, which was inevitable.

For example, if a practitioner breaks off his hand and then heals and regenerates a hand, the strength at the beginning is definitely not as good as the original hand, and it takes a certain amount of time to temper and run in.

The same is true for the Devourers, whose newborn scales and flesh are inferior to the original ones, and it takes time to recover and refine.

However, in the middle of the battle, there was no time for him to recover.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's blow of the Shadow Thorn silently stabbed Kurosaki's neck, piercing through the past at once, and really hurting him for the first time.

Then, the attacks of the Jinchen Dao Ancestors also came one by one, inflicting heavy damage on Kurosaki.

After a while, Kurosaki couldn't stand it.

"Capture him alive!"

Jin Chen Daozu proposed.

Immediately, the four half-step domain ancestors joined forces to perform the sealing technique, and soon sealed Kurosaki, who was seriously injured and dying and cultivated to a great descent.

With the blessing of one sealing technique after another, Kurosaki was sealed into a black boulder, completely unable to move.

"Dao Ancestor of All Things, let's immediately return to Wind Mountain and bring this Devouring Clan back to the Mountain Lord!"

Flame Crack Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the group returned to Fengshan Mountain.
